introSection: Big Adventure Coaster is a Senyo Kogyo sit-down roller coaster located in Wakayama Adventure World in Wakayama, Japan.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows in all cars excluding the front, which has 2 rows, for a total of 34 riders per train.

fullText:
Big Adventure Coaster is a Senyo Kogyo sit-down roller coaster located in Wakayama Adventure World in Wakayama, Japan.



6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows in all cars excluding the front, which has 2 rows, for a total of 34 riders per train.
